---
title: "Bioconductor Spatial Data and Image Analysis Hackathon"
subtitle: "Venice, April 2026"
date: today
author:
  - name: Helena Crowell
    orcid: 0000-0002-4801-1767
    email: helena@crowell.eu
    affiliations:
      - ref: cnag
    corresponding: true
  - name: Luca Marconato
    orcid: 0000-0003-3198-1326
    email: luca.marconato@embl.de
    affiliations:
      - ref: embl
      - ref: dkfz
  - name: Ilaria Billato
    orcid: 0000-0002-3335-3254
    email: ilaria.billato@unipd.it
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipd
  - name: Matteo Calgaro
    orcid: 0000-0002-3056-518X
    email: matteo.calgaro@unipd.it
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipd
  - name: Robert Castelo
    orcid: 0000-0003-2229-4508
    email: robert.castelo@upf.edu
    affiliations:
      - ref: upf
  - name: Carissa Chen
    orcid: 0000-0002-9225-7086
    email: carissayannan.chen@unipd.it
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipd
  - name: Sean Davis
    orcid: 0000-0002-8991-6458
    email: seandavi@gmail.com
    affiliations:
      - ref: anschutz
  - name: Martin Emons
    orcid: 0009-0000-5219-5311
    email: martin.emons@uzh.ch
    affiliations:
      - ref: uzh-sib
  - name: Gabriel Grajeda
    orcid: 0009-0003-7242-7476
    email: ggrajeda@g.harvard.edu
    affiliations:
      - ref: harvard
  - name: Hugo Gruson
    orcid: 0000-0002-4094-1476
    email: hugo.gruson@embl.de
    affiliations:
      - ref: embl
  - name: Samuel Gunz
    orcid: 0000-0002-8909-0932
    email: samuel.gunz@uzh.ch
    affiliations:
      - ref: uzh-sib
  - name: Juan Henao
    orcid: 0000-0003-0783-1432
    email: juanhenao.sanchez@gmail.com
    affiliations:
      - ref: helmholtz
  - name: Sviatoslav Kharuk
    orcid: 0009-0006-9901-6185
    email: sviatoslav.kharuk@embl.de
    affiliations:
      - ref: embl
  - name: Daria Lazic
    orcid: 0000-0002-8793-6885
    email: daria.lazic@embl.de
    affiliations:
      - ref: embl
  - name: Artür Manukyan
    orcid: 0000-0002-0441-9517
    email: artur-man@hotmail.com
    affiliations:
      - ref: mdc
  - name: Pere Moles-Seró
    orcid: 0009-0009-4408-1897
    email: pere.moles@upf.edu
    affiliations:
      - ref: upf
  - name: Elizabeth Purdom
    orcid: 0000-0001-9455-7990
    email: epurdom@stat.berkeley.edu
    affiliations:
      - ref: berkeley
  - name: Dario Righelli
    orcid: 0000-0003-1504-3583
    email: dario.righelli@unipd.it
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipd-dibio
  - name: Gabriele Sales
    orcid: 0000-0003-2078-5661
    email: gabriele.sales@unipd.it
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipd
  - name: Mike L. Smith
    orcid: 0000-0002-7800-3848
    email: grimbough@gmail.com
    affiliations:
      - ref: boehringer
  - name: Charlotte Soneson
    orcid: 0000-0003-3833-2169
    email: charlotte.soneson@fmi.ch
    affiliations:
      - ref: fmi
      - ref: sib-basel
  - name: Michael B. Stadler
    orcid: 0000-0002-2269-4934
    email: michael.stadler@fmi.ch
    affiliations:
      - ref: fmi
      - ref: sib-basel
      - ref: unibasel
  - name: Wolfgang Huber
    affiliations:
      - ref: embl
  - name: Davide Risso
    orcid: 0000-0001-8508-5012
    email: davide.risso@unipd.it
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipd
    corresponding: true
affiliations:
  - id: cnag
    name: Centro Nacional de Análisis Genómico, Barcelona, Spain
  - id: embl
    name: European Molecular Biology Laboratory, Heidelberg, Germany
  - id: dkfz
    name: German Cancer Research Center (DKFZ), Heidelberg, Germany
  - id: unipd
    name: University of Padova, Padova, Italy
  - id: unipd-dibio
    name: Department of Biology (DiBio), University of Padova, Padova, Italy
  - id: upf
    name: Universitat Pompeu Fabra, Barcelona, Spain
  - id: anschutz
    name: University of Colorado Anschutz School of Medicine, Aurora, CO, USA
  - id: uzh-sib
    name: University of Zurich and Swiss Institute of Bioinformatics, Zurich, Switzerland
  - id: harvard
    name: Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health, Boston, MA, USA
  - id: helmholtz
    name: Computational Health Center, Helmholtz Munich, Neuherberg, Germany
  - id: mdc
    name: Max Delbrück Center for Molecular Medicine, Berlin, Germany
  - id: berkeley
    name: Department of Statistics, University of California, Berkeley, CA, USA
  - id: boehringer
    name: Computational Innovation, Boehringer Ingelheim Pharma GmbH & Co. KG, Biberach, Germany
  - id: fmi
    name: Friedrich Miescher Institute for Biomedical Research, Basel, Switzerland
  - id: sib-basel
    name: SIB Swiss Institute of Bioinformatics, Basel, Switzerland
  - id: unibasel
    name: University of Basel, Basel, Switzerland
abstract: |
  We report the outcomes of the Bioconductor Spatial Data and Image Analysis
  Hackathon, held in Venice, Italy in April 2026. Twenty-four researchers and
  software developers organized into four teams to advance R/Bioconductor
  capabilities for spatial omics and image analysis. Outputs include scalable
  raster–polygon workflows for whole-slide pathology, an R package for running
  spatial foundation models via reticulate/basilisk, a spatially stratified
  differential expression framework, and substantial enhancements to the
  R `SpatialData` infrastructure for interoperability with the Python `spatialdata`
  ecosystem. All software is openly available and under active development.
keywords:
  - Bioconductor
  - spatial omics
  - image analysis
  - foundation models
  - SpatialData
---

{{< include sections/01-introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/02-image-analysis.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/03-foundation-models.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04-stratified-de.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/05-interoperability.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/06-discussion.qmd >}}

# Code and data availability

All software developed during the hackathon is hosted in public GitHub repositories linked from the relevant team sections.

# Author contributions

H.C., L.M., W.H., and D.R. organized and led the hackathon.
All authors participated in one or more team projects and contributed to the manuscript.

# Use of AI tools

Claude (Anthropic, model `claude-opus-4-7`) was used to convert team-authored Google Docs into this Quarto project, scaffold the CI/CD workflow, and propose structural edits — including the table in @tbl-image-stack and the diagrams in @fig-spatialdata-layers and @fig-stratified-de-pipeline.
The authors reviewed all AI output and retain full responsibility for the manuscript's content.

# Acknowledgements

We thank the hackathon hosts and sponsors for making this event possible.
